page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package provides functions for fitting MOSAiCS-HMM, an statistical framework to analyze one-sample or two-sample ChIP-seq data of transcription factor binding and histone modification.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package provides functions for fitting MOSAiCS-HMM, an statistical framework to analyze one-sample or two-sample ChIP-seq data of transcription factor binding and histone modification.
